narrative: UK and Eurozone flash PMIs beat expectations, lifting GBP and EUR as business activity rebounds; GBP/USD at 1.3321 and EUR/USD at 1.1386 find support despite the ECB's neutral hold stance. USD/JPY holds near 163.74 as the Fed-BoJ 275bp OIS carry remains the dominant anchor, while gold consolidates +0.19%; equities -1.21%; DXY -0.05%; VIX 18.8. Watch the Fed and BoE policy decisions on July 29-30.
